memo: HF 1.120 < trigger 1.200. Target 1.380. Debt 5.00 USDC. Candidates: TOP-UP, ROTATE, DELEVERAGE. Reason: TOPUP fully restores health to the 1.380 target at zero cost with no swap, slippage, or collateral sold, while both other candidates only partially fix the position and leave it below target.
